connectors.name: CS - Chip Select
connectors.description: This pin is used to enable access to this device and is active low. Access will be granted when this pin has a logic low presented to it. Connect this pin to a digital output pin of your controller or tie to 0V (ground) of the power supply for this circuit to permanently enable this device

connectors.name: SO - Data Out
connectors.description: This pin is used to read data from this device. Connect this pin to the 'SPI Data In' (DI/DIN/SI) pin or to a digital input pin of your controller

connectors.name: WP - Write Protect
connectors.description: This pin is used to write protect this device and is active low. Connect this pin to a digital output of your controller or to the positive rail or 0V (ground) of your power supply. When presented with a logic low signal or connected to 0V (ground) the EEPROM will be write protected and memory contents cannot be altered

connectors.name: 0V
connectors.description: Connect to the 0V (ground) of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: SI - Data In
connectors.description: This pin is used to write data into this device. Connect this pin to the 'SPI Data Out' (DO/DOUT/SO) pin or to a digital output pin of your controller

connectors.name: SCK - SPI Clock
connectors.description: This pin is used to clock data in and data out of the device. Connect this pin to the 'SPI Clock' (SCK/SCLK) pin or to a digital output pin of your controller

connectors.name: HOLD
connectors.description: This pin is used to pause communications to this device and is active low. Communications will be paused when this pin has a logic low presented to it. Connect this pin to a digital output pin of your controller or connect to the positive rail of the power supply for this circuit if communications are not to be paused

connectors.name: +V
connectors.description: Connect to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit
